COCORELICS-ZEDU_COCO.title: Zedu Cocoa
COCORELICS-ZEDU_COCO.description: Right-click to observe a room. Any room you observe becomes [red]fixed[/red]. Combines with Very Hot Cocoa into Big Meal.
COCORELICS-BIG_MEAL.title: Big Meal
COCORELICS-BIG_MEAL.description: Gain [blue]{Energy:energyIcons()}[/blue] each turn. After {SurviveRounds} rounds, you die and this relic transfers to a teammate.
COCORELICS-BIG_MEAL.flavor: [red]The day before yesterday it was xx, yesterday it was xx, today it's you...[/red]
